colors.name: paper
colors.role: background — the sheet under inspection; never pure white

colors.name: ink
colors.role: all body text, headings, thick and thin rules (17.6:1 on paper)

colors.name: bureau-red
colors.role: the one red: status marks, hairlines, stamp, focus ring, selection, large display fills only — 4.55:1 on paper clears AA normal text by 0.05, which is inside tolerance but without margin, so the bureau never sets small red text

colors.name: hairline
colors.role: decorative only: what bureau-red at 28% alpha composites to over paper — the column overlay and baseline grid hairlines; never functional

fonts.role: the standard itself — variable font with the width axis (wdth 62–125) as the entry's entire expressive budget; wordmark, headings, body
every Hangul glyph — the clause hand; Korean falls through Archivo into it with no markup
annotations, coordinates, tabular figures, stamp lettering — the inspector's pencil

texture: None. The paper is flat #f7f7f5 — the only texture is the exposed construction itself: a fixed column overlay (two layers, 12-col and 6-col, sharing the exact frame, tracks, and gutter of the content grids, cross-faded by opacity when the certification changes) plus a 24px baseline grid of faint red hairlines in the hero. The page wears its own blueprint.

motion.name: ease-raster
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1) — brisk in, dead stop, zero overshoot; the bureau does not bounce

motion.name: flip-resnap
motion.value: 560ms ease-raster on transform; First/Last measured around a flushSync re-render, inverted inline, played by CSS

motion.name: overlay-crossfade
motion.value: 240ms ease-raster, opacity only — the hairlines redraw instantly-ish; the content complies over 560ms

motion.name: wdth-in
motion.value: 1100ms ease-raster per glyph, font-variation-settings 'wdth' 62 → 125, 55ms stagger, backwards fill; 100% keyframe equals the resting style so hover transitions take over without a jump

motion.name: wdth-hover
motion.value: 300ms ease-raster to 'wdth' 62 on the hovered glyph — decorative demonstration, no meaning

motion.name: stamp-draw
motion.value: 900ms ease-raster stroke-dashoffset 1 → 0 (pathLength=1), rings staggered 0/200/420ms, lettering fades in at 720ms

motion.name: cert-rule-draw
motion.value: 1100ms ease-raster, 480ms delay, same pathLength trick on the footer rule

motion.name: modular-scale-scrub
motion.value: scroll-driven scale(0.750 → 1) per step — exactly one ratio step (1/1.333) of travel; smoothstep easing, 0.09 progress stagger, one getBoundingClientRect per rAF

motion.name: crosshair
motion.value: raw pointermove coordinates written in rAF, translate3d only — no lerp; instruments report, they do not smooth
